text.title: Agent Gotchas and Best Practices
text.summary: Critical failure modes in LLM-generated Axum code and the corresponding rules to prevent them.

rule.statement: Every variant of AppError must appear in the IntoResponse match arm. Adding a new variant without updating IntoResponse compiles but panics at runtime via the unreachable default.
rule.rationale: Rust does not force exhaustive matching when the fallback arm is present. A missing variant silently returns 500 with an empty body instead of the intended status code.

antipattern.description: Adding a new AppError variant and relying on a wildcard arm in IntoResponse.
antipattern.reason: Wildcard arms hide the contract break. Require explicit per-variant match at code review.

rule.statement: Map validator::ValidationErrors to per-field error arrays in the response. Never return the raw ValidationErrors debug string — it leaks field names in an uncontrolled format.
rule.rationale: The default Display for ValidationErrors is not RFC 7807 compatible. Clients receive an opaque string instead of a structured errors array.

rule.statement: Clone an sqlx::Pool to share across tasks — cloning is O(1) (Arc internally). Never call Pool::connect per request to "fix" Send issues.
rule.rationale: Pool::connect opens a new TCP connection. Calling it per request exhausts file descriptors under load. Pool clone shares the existing connection pool cheaply.

rule.statement: Layer middleware in this order, outer to inner: TraceLayer, request-id, CORS, auth, rate-limit, app router. Adding layers in wrong order silently misses authentication.
rule.rationale: Axum applies middleware from outermost to innermost. Auth middleware added after the route handler is never reached.

rule.statement: Run sqlx prepare and commit the .sqlx/ directory so CI builds without requiring DATABASE_URL at compile time.
rule.rationale: sqlx::query! macros verify SQL against a live DB at compile time. Without cached query data, offline builds and CI without a DB fail.

text.reference: AppError enum with all variants and IntoResponse mapping to RFC 7807
